scripts.dev:go-worker: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/go-worker && PORT=${GO_WORKER_PORT:-8081} go run ./cmd/worker'
scripts.dev:py-worker: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/py-worker && uv sync --quiet && PORT=${PY_WORKER_PORT:-8082} uv run python -m py_worker.main'
scripts.db:up: sh -c 'if [ -f infra/docker-compose.yml ]; then docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d; else echo "Skipping db:up: infra/docker-compose.yml not found"; fi'
scripts.db:down: sh -c 'if [ -f infra/docker-compose.yml ]; then docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down; else echo "Skipping db:down: infra/docker-compose.yml not found"; fi'
scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/api && dbmate --migrations-dir src/db/migrations --schema-file src/db/schema.sql up'
scripts.db:rollback: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/api && dbmate --migrations-dir src/db/migrations --schema-file src/db/schema.sql rollback'
